# Find Child Object

**Menu:** `Actions/Object/Hierarchy`

**Nome serializado:** `FindChildObject`

**Classe fonte:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Actions/ObjectRelated/Hierarchy/FindChildObjectNode.java`

**Fluxo de saida superior:** `Nao`

## Funcao

Procura o elemento ou recurso relacionado a `Child Object`.
